concerns.text: FR-001 (Ingestion/Validation) and SC-001 (Variable Load % metric) lack a dedicated task to generate the `data/config/required_variables.yaml` file referenced by T004a/b and T012. T012 assumes this file exists to read the list of variables, but no task creates it. Without this artifact, the validation logic cannot function.

FR-007 (6-hour execution limit) and SC-004 (Timing evidence) are partially covered by T016, but T016 is marked as [ ] (incomplete) and depends on T014b (filtered data) which is also [ ]. There is no task explicitly defined to generate the `data/results/timing_evidence.json` artifact if the pipeline fails early (e.g., due to missing variables), which is required to satisfy SC-001 even on partial failure as noted in T012's description.

FR-004 (Associational framing) is addressed by T026a, but T026a is marked [ ] (incomplete). Furthermore, T026 (Report Generation) depends on T026a. If T026a is not implemented, the final report will lack the mandatory 'associational' framing, violating FR-004. No fallback or alternative task exists to ensure this constraint is met.

FR-006 (VIF and Collinearity) requires detecting 'Perfect Multicollinearity' via matrix rank check. T021h is marked [ ] (incomplete) and is the only task performing the dynamic matrix rank check. T031 (VIF Calculation) depends on T021h. Without T021h, the system cannot detect linear dependence as required by FR-006, leaving the VIF calculation incomplete and potentially erroneous.

FR-001 (Real Data Ingestion) and the 'No-Synthetic-Fallback' constraint are addressed by T051a/b and T055, but T051a and T055 are marked [ ] (incomplete). The plan relies on these tasks to enforce the 'Pipeline Validation Study' scope. Without their implementation, the pipeline may inadvertently fall back to synthetic data or fail to halt on missing real data, violating the core scope definition and FR-001.

FR-007 (6-hour limit) and Assumption-001 (Compute constraints) require handling large datasets via streaming or fail-fast. T058 (RAM Pre-check), T059 (Streaming), and T060 (RAM Fail-fast) are all marked [ ] (incomplete). Without these, the pipeline cannot handle datasets approaching the 7GB limit or enforce the 6-hour constraint for large inputs, violating FR-007 and Assumption-001.

Constitution Principle VI (Biological Sample Integrity) requires handling the 'Synthetic Only' state. T073 (Update Constitution Checker) is marked [ ] (incomplete). Without this task, the automated checker may flag the synthetic-only state as a violation, causing the pipeline to fail or produce incorrect status reports, violating the Constitution.

T070 is listed twice: once in Phase N+4 (as 'LARGE PROXY GENERATOR') and again in Phase N+5 (as 'VALIDATION OF REAL-DATA RESULTS'). The second instance (Phase N+5) has a different description and output (`real_vs_synthetic_comparison.json`) but shares the same ID. This is a stale/duplicate tag that needs resolution to avoid confusion.
